steps.title: Identify the positive solution
steps.content: The positive solutions are $16$ and $12$. The answer is 16 or 12.

steps.title: Confirm the answer
steps.content: The final check is to make sure the computed value answers exactly what the question asks for. The work above gives $16,12$, and substituting or interpreting that value in the original condition satisfies the requirement. Therefore the value to enter is $16,12$.
